Hero.title: Software Engineering Student & Tech Support Professional.
Hero.description: Hi, I'm Esteban Mora. A Software Engineering student with 3+ years of technical support experience in SaaS. Passionate about building well-crafted systems and helping users succeed — from architecture to interface.

paragraphs.p1: I'm Esteban Mora, a Software Engineering student and bilingual tech professional based in Toronto, Canada. Alongside my studies, I've built 3+ years of professional experience across customer service at Teleperformance and client-facing administrative work at Legacy Barber Co. — where I also apply my technical skills in content creation and process automation.
paragraphs.p2: On the technical side, I'm passionate about building well-crafted systems from the ground up — whether that's architecting a backend API, designing a clean interface, or debugging a problem under pressure. I believe great software is born where solid engineering meets intentional design.
paragraphs.p3: Working in high-volume customer-facing environments with tools like Zendesk, Slack and Excel taught me something most developers learn much later: how real users interact with software, what frustrates them, and what makes them succeed. That perspective shapes the way I write code.
paragraphs.p4: I'm currently open to Remote and hybrid Technical Support Engineer, Customer Success, and Junior Developer roles in Toronto and beyond. I'm looking for a team where I can contribute from day one, grow alongside experienced people, and keep building things that matter.

Contact.subtitle: I'm one message away. Let's build something great together.

form.title: Send a message
form.success: ✓ Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

p1.name: Runthe1s
p1.description: A mobile basketball community app featuring ELO rankings, structured leagues, court finder and player profiles.

modal.overview_text: Runthe1s is a mobile basketball community app available on the App Store, built for players and teams to organize games, track performance, and compete in structured leagues. Currently active with 93+ players.
modal.role_text: Developer — actively building and shipping features in a collaborative team environment.
modal.contribution_text: Designed and implemented a full league system that allows organizers to create competitions, invite players, track standings, and manage different tournament formats — bringing structure to recreational basketball communities.
modal.feature_elo_desc: Global and city-based rankings that update after every game
modal.feature_league_desc: Create and manage tournaments with standings tracking
modal.feature_profile_desc: Stats, highlights, game history and rivals
